title: Associate – Transfer Pricing
metaDescription: Associate – Transfer Pricing role in Singapore: prepare documentation and benchmarking studies, conduct functional analyses, and support advisory engagements.
description: Join our rapidly expanding team. We are looking for an experienced Associate – Transfer Pricing to join our team in Singapore.
duties: Assist in preparing transfer pricing documentation and benchmarking studies.
Conduct functional analyses and economic and industry research.
Support advisory engagements on intercompany pricing and policy design.
Assist clients in responding to transfer pricing queries from the tax authorities.
Keep up to date with OECD guidelines and local transfer pricing regulations.
requirements: Degree in Accountancy, Economics, Finance, or a related field.
1 – 3 years of transfer pricing or tax experience.
remuneration: Remuneration will be commensurate with qualifications and experience.
